ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's website URL */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal of the school */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers at the school */,
  "total_classrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of classrooms at the school */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES school_administrators ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* GreatSchools rating (e.g., 1-5, NR) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was assigned */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description or comments related to the rating */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews considered for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_ratings_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the grade */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Level of the grade (e.g., Elementary, Middle) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade (e.g., K-5, 2-5) */,
  "grade_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students per grade */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the grade */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher responsible for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the parent or guardian */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the administrator is associated with */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Principal, Vice Principal) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the administrator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_administrators_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher is employed by */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "subject_taught" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Teaching certification(s) held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher started at the school */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_teacher_association" (
  "pta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PTA member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the PTA member is associated with */,
  "pta_name" TEXT /* Name of the PTA member */,
  "pta_role" TEXT /* Role of the PTA member (e.g., President, Treasurer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the PTA member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the PTA member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the PTA member started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the PTA member ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_teacher_association_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school organizing the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Academic, Sports) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_events_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, parent) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level(s) the subject is taught in */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the subject is taught */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "grade_value" REAL /* Grade value (e.g., 90.5) */,
  "grading_period" TEXT /* Grading period (e.g., Semester 1, Q3) */,
  "date_graded" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
